rows.label: tlk44400287_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Luxurian science has been passed
down for generations, so our knowledge
far surpasses the Superbians'.

rows.label: tlk44400287_01_msg0002
rows.name:
You're outlanders, if I'm not
mistaken? Then I must not sound
like we're blowing our trumpets.

rows.label: tlk44400287_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Thanks to ancient records, we
can handle all manner of issues...
That is all I will say.
